title: Corpus (read interface)
description: Describes a corpus as it is PRESENTED to a caller via list_corpora. This is an interface schema (what you receive), not a construction schema (how the corpus is built).

domain.description: One-line human description of the body of law.

coverage_note.description: Honest note on what is and is not covered, and that only a sample ships here.

instrument_count_sample.description: Instruments included as a sample in THIS repo.

included_here.description: What this connector repo physically contains for the corpus.

full_corpus_included.description: Always false. The full corpus is never bundled in this connector.

license_note.description: Compilation licence + reminder that source texts keep their own terms.
